items: Added mobile hamburger slide-out drawer menu with user profile and nav links
Changed nav labels: Browse to Discover, Chat to Messages
Redesigned chat input with Messenger-style pill, SVG icons (emoji, photo, send)
Fixed profile photo upload on Vercel (direct REST API to Supabase Storage)
Rewrote FAQ page for end-users (removed backend/admin content)
Created journey.html - full vibe coding story page with modern layout
Integrated multi-AI workflow: Claude (architecture), DeepSeek (coding), ChatGPT (design)
Cleaned up Vercel projects - deleted 3 duplicate projects
Added Database Access section to documentation
Updated workspace guide with localhost-first review workflow
Removed contact modal from profile page, added email link in footer
Removed em dashes from all public pages
Removed Socket.io references from docs (replaced with Supabase Realtime)
Mobile responsive styles added for all pages via style.css
Fixed footer spacing and hidden footer on chat page for immersive mobile view
Phase 1 - Supabase local setup: installed Docker Desktop and initialized local Supabase instance
Supabase running at http://127.0.0.1:54323 (Studio), port 54321 (API), 54322 (PostgreSQL)
Migration plan from lowdb (JSON) to Supabase (PostgreSQL) established
Project backup created before migration
Phase 2 - Created Supabase tables: users, messages, contacts
Phase 3 - Migrated existing data from db.json to Supabase (5 users, 19 messages, 2 contacts)
Phase 4 - Replaced all lowdb queries with @supabase/supabase-js across all routes and socket events
Phase 5 - Moved file uploads to Supabase Storage (profile photos, chat files)
Removed lowdb dependency from project
lowdb JSON database fully replaced by Supabase PostgreSQL
Created cloud Supabase project (CWD) at hpezaqvtufrvvczyixwc.supabase.co
Migrated data from local Supabase to cloud Supabase PostgreSQL
Created cloud Storage bucket for file uploads
Updated database.js and server.js with cloud Supabase credentials
App fully connected to cloud Supabase via localhost:3000
Created cloud Supabase project (CWD) for production
Migrated data and storage to cloud Supabase
Deployed app to Vercel at https://spark-social-app-ys49.vercel.app
Replaced Socket.io with Supabase Realtime for live chat messages
Added REST API endpoints for message CRUD operations
Uploaded profile photos and chat files to Supabase Storage
Updated photo URLs in database to point to cloud Storage
Fixed Supabase CDN to jsdelivr for reliable loading
Updated homepage hero text: 'Real conversations start here.' and subtitle: 'Meet people who match your vibe.'
Changed theme from pink to green (brand colors, hover effects, auth gradient)
Renamed nav label "Messages" to "Chat"
Renamed app from "dating" to "social" throughout
Added error logging system (logger.js, /api/logs, logs.html)
Added contact form on Profile page with Formspree integration
Added documentation.html - full HTML technical docs
Added Terms & Conditions page (terms.html)
Added Privacy Policy page (privacy.html)
Added FAQ & Troubleshooting page (faq.html)
Added auto edit mode for Reasonix
Fixed PDF generator alignment for feature sections
Moved Docs link from navbar to Admin panel
Replaced all em dashes with regular dashes across docs
Premium UI redesign - glassmorphism, ambient blobs, floating elements, noise texture
Improved login page with cinematic gradient, animated glow, premium card
Improved browse page with premium member cards, hover lift, soft background
Improved chat page - neutral background, message animations, online pulse, better bubbles
Fixed send button compression and avatar loading in chat
Added consistent ambient backgrounds across all pages via style.css
Initial release of Spark social app
User authentication (register, login, forgot/reset password, change password)
User profiles with photo upload, name, age, gender, bio
Member discovery with online/offline presence indicators
Real-time chat with emoji picker, file sharing, edit/delete messages
Unread badges and browser notifications
Admin panel with stats, user management, message logs
lowdb JSON database, Socket.io, JWT + bcrypt auth
Responsive frontend (HTML + CSS + Vanilla JS)
